Highly motivated Operations Researcher with 5+ years of extensive research in the modeling, control, simulation, and optimization of smart energy and manufacturing systems. Strong technical skills in computer programming, data analysis, scientific computing, optimization, and fundamental mathematics. Highly interested in the application of optimization and machine learning tools to advance decision-making in the design and operation of smart systems in both energy and manufacturing industries. results.title: Social Media Community Manager job at Eastman Chemical in US National | Wfh
highlights:
Social Media Community Manager job at Eastman Chemical in US National | Wfh
...
# Social Media Community Manager job at Eastman Chemical in US National
...
Title: Social Media Community Manager
...
Founded in 1920, Eastman is a global specialty materials company that produces a broad range of products found in items people use every day. With the purpose of enhancing the quality of life in a material way, Eastman works with customers to deliver innovative products and solutions while maintaining a commitment to safety and sustainability. The company’s innovation-driven growth model takes advantage of world-class technology platforms, deep customer engagement, and differentiated application development to grow its leading positions in attractive end markets such as transportation, building and construction, and consumables. As a globally inclusive company, Eastman employs approximately 13,000 people around the world and serves customers in more than 100 countries. The company had 2025 revenue of approximately $8.8 billion and is headquartered in Kingsport, Tennessee, USA. For more information, visit
...
Eastman is seeking a skilled social media community manager with a passion for building our brand presence on social media and leveraging performance-driven metrics to enhance our brand experience. As the social media community manager, you will leverage a mix of strategic skills and creative thinking with a focus on creating high performing content for our B2B audiences. This involves developing creative concepts and compelling content in partnership with internal teams, managing the brand’s presence across multiple platforms and geographies in a cohesive way, and engaging positively with users on behalf of the brand. This role will leverage data-driven decision-making to best position content, tell compelling stories and use real-time insights to achieve appropriate audience engagement, reach and growth. This requires close collaboration with global marketing teams, cross-functional stakeholders and creative to ensure a cohesive and effective expression of the brand across all digital touchpoints.
...
- Keep up to date with social media trends, analytics, conversations, functions, algorithms, new channels and content forms to identify opportunities and ensure the brand stays relevant in a dynamic market.
...
- Serve as a thought leader for AI-driven automation for community management to enhance responsiveness and engagement longer term.
...
social media efforts
...
- Extensive knowledge of social media platforms including best practices, trends, platform requirements, and algorithms.
...
- Strong analytical skills to interpret data and make data-driven decisions around what is effective in driving business results and meeting KPIs.
...
- Ability to think creatively, generate innovative ideas, and adapt based on data.
...
- Minimum of 3 years of social media experience
- Agency experience is a plus.
- Proficient in Sprout and/or Asana

highlights:
Chemistry Freshers Job at Eastman Careers Regulatory Affairs Jobs SDS SAP compliance
...
## Chemistry Freshers Job at Eastman | Regulatory Affairs Hiring
...
This Chemistry Freshers Job at Eastman offers an exciting entry into global Regulatory Affairs Jobs through structured learning and hands-on exposure. Candidates joining through Eastman Careers will work on Safety Data Sheet (SDS) authoring, SAP-based product compliance, and hazard communication systems. This role is ideal for fresh graduates in chemistry or related sciences seeking strong industry exposure in regulatory systems and chemical safety compliance.
...
- Job Title: Regulatory Affairs Representative I – HAZCOM
- Location: Greater Hyderabad Area
...
Eastman is a global specialty materials company founded in 1920, serving customers in over 100 countries. With a strong innovation-driven model, Eastman focuses on sustainability, safety, and advanced material solutions. Through Eastman Careers, the company provides global opportunities in engineering, chemistry, and compliance. Its Hyderabad shared services center supports global operations, making it a key hub for Regulatory Affairs Jobs and product stewardship functions.
...
Job Overview:
...
This Chemistry Freshers Job in Regulatory Affairs focuses on Safety Data Sheet (SDS) authoring, hazard communication, and global product compliance. Candidates will work under supervision to manage regulatory data in SAP systems, ensure accurate SDS documentation, and support cross-functional teams in product stewardship. The role is
...
part of Regulatory Affairs Jobs within Eastman Careers, offering exposure to international chemical safety regulations and compliance frameworks.
...
Key Responsibilities:
...
- Assists in the planning, development, maintenance, and implementation of the SDS authoring process.
...
- Partners across all areas
...
RA organization to monitor
...
- SDS and label data maintenance for new and existing products, intermediates and experimental products. Position works under direct supervision as needed.
...
- Maintain regulatory and compositional information
...
suppliers and our
...
- Enter and maintain hazard assessment and regulatory data into product compliance support and MSDS authoring systems.
...
- Provide internal and external customer support related to hazard communication including SDS distribution.
...
- Actively participate in projects to continue to maintain compliance with global hazard communication regulations and related regulatory requirements.
...
- Use product compliance tools to retrieve/query production models, specifications, recipes, labeling information, global database searches.
...
- Support Eastman’s Product Stewardship and Regulatory Affairs activities.
...
Educational Requirements:
...
- Associate degree in chemistry, Biological Sciences, Toxicology or HSE related field or equivalent experience in these fields.
- Zero to two years of relevant experience.
- Knowledge of MS excel, spreadsheet software, SAP like tools or similar Applications.
...
Skills Required:
...
- Ability to multi-task and adapt to changing work priorities in a dynamic environment.
...
- Ability to focus on details, work autonomously and lead projects.
...
- SAP EHS module experience a plus.
...
- Results driven with excellent communication skills.
...
with ambiguity to meet specified deadlines.
...
- Good analytical, problem solving and organizational skills.
...
- Experience with innovative methodology for capturing and identifying metrics of key performance indicators.
...
This Chemistry Freshers Job at Eastman is a strong launchpad for candidates aiming to build a career in Regulatory Affairs Jobs. Through structured training and real-world exposure under Eastman Careers, freshers gain valuable experience in chemical compliance, SAP systems, and global safety standards. It is a career-building opportunity for those who want to grow in regulatory science and product stewardship domains.

...
How I transformed from a System Engineer to a CEO in data. 

I reinvented my approach.
...
Looking back at my initial career years, I can see that my focus was primarily on system functionalities. Now, I am leading an organization, focusing on value creation initiatives, speed and innovation.
...
Here are some key aspects of what I do now:
...
1. Critical thinking 
I challenge the status quo. 
I embrace multiple approaches.

# Scientific Lead, Generative AI Engineer, Applied Intelligence for Discovery
...
Employer Eli Lilly and Company Location San Francisco, California Start date Jun 15, 2026
...
## Job Details
...
We are building something unprecedented, an AI foundation that will fundamentally change how drug discovery research is conducted.
...
The Applied Intelligence for Discovery (AI4D) team is a newly formed group within Lilly Research Laboratories that operates at the intersection of scientific delivery and core platform development. AI4D’s mission is to connecting scientists to petabyte-scale data through natural language interfaces, automated analysis workflows, and intelligent search — and to convert early deployments into repeatable system standards and evaluation practices that scale across therapeutic areas.
...
As a Generative AI Engineer, you will design, build, and operate the core AI systems that power this transformation: retrieval-augmented generation over internal scientific documents, text-to-SQL over complex omics databases, agentic workflows that automate multi-step analyses, and the evaluation infrastructure that able the next-generation of medicines for patients.
...
Key Responsibilities
...
Design, build, and optimize RAG pipelines over internal publications, study reports, electronic lab notebooks, and other scientific documents
...
Build hybrid retrieval systems combining vector search with structured metadata, knowledge graphs, and ontology-aware filtering
...
Build and optimize text-to-SQL systems over Lilly’s databases, enabling scientists to query gene expression, proteomics, pathway, and variant data through natural language
...
Develop schema documentation, semantic annotations, and gold-standard question/SQL pairs that bridge how scientists think about data and how it is stored
...
Implement multi-step reasoning approaches (chain-of-thought, self-correction, Reflexion loops) to improve accuracy on complex scientific queries
...
Design agentic AI workflows that chain database queries, bioinformatics tools, literature search, and visualization into automated multi-step scientific analyses
...
Evaluate and integrate emerging orchestration frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, custom architectures) for scientific use cases
...
Build evaluation frameworks measuring accuracy, reliability, and scientific validity of AI outputs
...
PhD in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related technical field with 0-3+ years of experience; or equivalent experience building production LLM systems; MS in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related technical field with 5+ years of experience; or equivalent experience building production LLM systems
...
Experience building LLM-powered applications, including at least two of: RAG systems, text-to-SQL, agentic workflows, or fine-tuning pipelines
...
Strong software engineering skills in Python with experience building production-grade systems
...
Deep familiarity with the modern LLM ecosystem: embedding models, vector databases, and orchestration frameworks
...
Experience designing evaluation frameworks for LLM systems — systematic approaches to measuring accuracy, detecting hallucinations, and tracking regressions
...
Experience with MLOps/LLMOps tooling: experiment tracking, model registries, prompt versioning, A/B testing for AI systems
...
Knowledge of biomedical ontologies (Gene Ontology, MeSH, ChEBI) or experience integrating domain-specific knowledge into LLM systems

results.title: Machine Learning Scientist, Molecular Interactions job with Terray Therapeutics | 3058128
highlights:
Machine Learning Scientist, Molecular Interactions job with Terray Therapeutics | 3058128
...
# Machine Learning Scientist, Molecular Interactions
...
Employer Terray Therapeutics Location Remote (United States) Start date Jun 30, 2026
...
Discipline Information Technology, Business/Data Analytics, Science/R&D, Biotechnology Required Education Bachelors Degree Position Type Full time
...
Company Overview: Terray Therapeutics is a venture-backed biotechnology company where scientists and engineers build together to transform how small-molecule drugs are discovered and developed. By combining our nanotechnology, experimental science, machine learning, and automation, we leverage Terray’s ability to generate and learn from scale proprietary chemical data to discover novel medicines for patients in need.
...
At Terray, you will work alongside pioneers and experts in artificial intelligence, chemistry, drug discovery, automation, and nanotechnology in deeply interconnected workflows where computational and experimental teams continuously learn from one another. Our platform, EMMI (Experimentation Meets Machine Intelligence), powers iterative cycles of molecular design and wet-lab experimentation that rapidly improve our understanding of biochemical interactions and guide the next generation of discoveries.
...
Position Summary: Terray Therapeutics is seeking a ML scientist to join our team focused on extending structure informed generative models of potency to causal models of in-vivo molecular interactions. The role involves a significant amount of creative latitude, and the opportunity to directly impact real drug programs informed by large, proprietary datasets. Successful applicants must possess a comprehensive knowledge of how today’s structure informed models work, where they need improvement, and an enthusiasm to pursue genuinely novel modeling concepts while advancing measurable improvements. An opinionated perspective on the tension between the bitter lesson and physical constraints is a plus.
...
The responsibility of this role is experimentally realizing improvements in the selectivity, generality, scope, and/or accuracy of intermolecular interactions designed with ML models over our current state of the art through novel architectures.
...
Required Qualifications:
...
- A comprehensive understanding of existing work on ML modeling of in-vivo molecular interactions, and an informed desire to pursue open avenues for further improvement.
- Mastery of modern ML model development, training at scale and interest in developing novel approaches which can bootstrap to greater fidelity at inference time.
- Curious interest in novel approaches, and the plasticity to possibly attempt highly speculative but novel research.
...
- Basic familiarity with modern ML ops.
- Basic familiarity with other classes of other ML models implicated in Drug Design, and the ability to use these models to complete the design process.
- Ability to collaborate on a diverse team, and couple to deployed workflows for drug design scientists.
...
Terray is a biotechnology company with the technology, data, and mindset to radically change the way we discover and develop small molecule therapeutics. We explore molecules and targets broadly and deeply with a sophisticated integration of ultra-high throughput experimentation, generative AI, biology, medicinal chemistry, automation, and nanotechnology. Everything the company does is grounded in an iterative approach, producing massive amounts of precise, purpose-built data that gets increasingly valuable with each cycle of design and experimentation. The company’s platform uniquely blends experimentation and computation to improve the cost, speed, and success rate of small molecule drug discovery and development.
...
### Machine Learning Scientist, RL & Autonomous Discovery
